ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹3,500 Debit from your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Kripya dhyan dein ki aapke savings account (Account No: 1234567890) se 15/04/2026 ko 10:32 AM par ₹3,500 ka debit hua hai.

Transaction ki jankari online banking portal par check karein ya agar koi discrepancy ho to hamari support team se sampark karein.

Banking ke liye dhanyavaad.

Shubhkamnaye,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Payroll Update
spam.body:
Namaste Employee,

Aapko suchit kiya jaata hai ki recent tax regulations ki wajah se aapka payroll April 2026 ke liye update ho chuka hai. Salary ko bina kisi delay ke credit
